title: Rustic Greek Beef Stuffed Grape Leaves
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring succulent beef and tangy grape leaves, inspired by traditional Greek cuisine. This keto-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, being careful not to burn.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the beef stock concentrate and stir to combine, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
